solar.title: Build a Create: New Age Solar Panel array (generates heat → boiler → steam power)

heat_pipe.title: Build a Heat Pipe network from reactor to boiler to Steam Engine

nuclear_reactor.title: Construct a Create: New Age Nuclear Reactor (uranium fuel chain required)

subtitle.translate: The Engineers built perfect machines for the wrong purpose. You build the reactor knowing that.

description: The Create: New Age Nuclear Reactor generates heat.
Heat pipes carry it to Fluid Tank boilers.
Boilers generate steam. Steam drives the Engine.
This replaces Blaze Burners in the highest-tier steam setup.
Solar Panels are the passive alternative.
Enough solar panels can run the factory without fuel.
The Rogue Eye is the Engineers' inheritance.
Their machines worked perfectly for the wrong purpose.
The question is not whether the reactor works.
It is what you point it at.
→ Run a Heat Pipe network to a boiler [check]
